title: Luffy Enters the War: Turning Point
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #3, Spandam, Magellan, Brook, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #28 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Unknown person #3, Spandam, Magellan, Brook, Unknown person #17, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy enters the war: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Did you hear the big news!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The age of Pirates is here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We've gotta get out!! Right now....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The sea belongs to pirates now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: The Myth of the Prison Crumbled...

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: He cut off his own feet....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: We can't let him get away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Magellan
dialogue.text: Thanks for the past two years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What are you doing crawling, brat!?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Oh, don't worry. Kuna will be strong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, that's odd. Could it be travellers...?

summary: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Unknown person #3, Spandam, Magellan, Brook, Unknown person #17, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy enters the war: turning point.
